subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify sentence types according to structure

sections.heading: Sentence Types
sections.content: The note covers simple, compound, multiple, complex, and compound-complex sentence structures.

sections.heading: Sentence Elements
sections.content: The elements listed are subject, verb, object, complement, and adjunct.

sections.heading: Basic Patterns
sections.content: The lesson presents patterns such as SV, SVO, SVC, SVOO, SVOC, SVA, and SVOA.
